# Built to Rank
> Web design and local SEO for trades businesses in the GTA, Ontario, Canada.
> Founder: Arjan Dhillon
> Services: Website Design, SEO Setup, Monthly Retainer
> Location: Brampton, Ontario | Serving: Brampton, Mississauga, Caledon, Bolton, Vaughan, Peel Region, Greater Toronto Area
> Site: https://builttorank.ca
> Contact: builttorank@hotmail.com | 647-657-8525

## About
Built to Rank builds fully custom websites for trades businesses across the GTA and sets them up to rank on Google from day one. No templates. No agencies with 20 middlemen. Direct access to the developer.

## Services
- Website Design & Development: Custom, mobile-first websites built in 30-47 days. Starting from $500 CAD.
- SEO Setup & Optimization: Schema markup, sitemap, Google Business Profile guidance, on-page keyword optimization. Starting from $800 CAD (bundled with website).
- Monthly Retainer: Ongoing updates, SEO monitoring, priority support. Starting from $299/mo CAD.

## Who We Work With
Plumbers, roofers, landscapers, HVAC contractors, painters, excavators, general contractors in the Greater Toronto Area.
